name: S-13 freshness gate exits two when --fetch-frequency is not in the architecture-allowed enum (hourly daily weekly monthly)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id src --fetch-frequency yearly --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown fetch-frequency' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
